TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Qapu' ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 39 buwan, 100 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 97 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 96%, Truku 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Qapu' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Qapu' hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Qapu' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Qapu' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Qapu' hya' ga Qus. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč qapu Ē …£a nija mki s~…ēku toweŇč s~…ēi atu ńßos~…ēiŇč ku, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku * ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, tajan **%, truku *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran, kjokaj. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na qapu Ē ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na qapu Ē ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na qapu Ē ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkraja Ē na qapu Ē ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na qapu Ē ńßja Ē …£a qus~…ē. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Qapu' ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 39 buwan, 100 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 97 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 96%, Truku 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Qapu' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Qapu' hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Qapu' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Qapu' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Qapu' hya' ga Qus. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč qapu Ē …£a nija mki s~…ēku toweŇč s~…ēi atu ńßos~…ēiŇč ku, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku * ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, tajan **%, truku *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran, kjokaj. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na qapu Ē ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na qapu Ē ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na qapu Ē ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkraja Ē na qapu Ē ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na qapu Ē ńßja Ē …£a qus~…ē. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
